Repro only in Honor x6b/ Android 14 **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87089 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** N/A **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Honor x6b/ Android 14 **App Component:** Workspace Settings ## Action Performed: 1. For a new account, complete onboarding with "Manage my team's expenses" 2. Tap on the workspace > Overview page 3. Tab the Invite member button 4. Enter and select an email address 5. Tap Next > Tap Invite 6. Tab the Invite member button 7. Add a email address > Next Result: App crashes 8. Launch app 9. Tap on the workspace > Overview page 10. Tab the Invite member button 11. Add a email address > Next Result: App crashes 12. Repeat step 8 to 11 Result: App crashes ## Expected Result: User should land on the Invite message screen without any crash ## Actual Result: App crashes ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/45d5fa60-512c-4d7a-98de-30cec41998d5 [dumpstate_log.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27067141/dumpstate_log.txt) [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

title: [$250] Nested table rows no longer highlight on hover or open expense in RHP on click

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

body:
Nested table rows in the report view no longer highlight on hover, and clicking the row no longer opens the expense in the RHP. Users must now click the `>` chevron tap area exactly to open the expense. This is a regression likely introduced by the compact table styles update (https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/86283). **Parent issue:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues/86102 **Related draft PR:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/88296 **Slack thread:** https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07NMDKEFMH/p1776703628974419

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.62-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/folder/39523254/test-cases/86239624 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** N/A **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** Android 13 / Xiaomi Poco F5 **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: 1. Login to the ND app 2. Navigate to WS Chat 3. Click + > Track Distance > GPS 4. Start the GPS tracking, kill and reopen the app 5. Stop the GPS tracking, then discard the distance tracking 6. Repeat steps 4-5 7. Start the GPS tracking 8. While the trip is in progress kill the app or force close 9. Reopen the app ## Expected Result: App should not crash when reopening while the GPS trip is in progress ## Actual Result: App crashes reopening while the GPS trip is in progress after discard the distance tracking twice Note: - The app will crash several time on the next reopening, then it can be launched normally again - Not reproducible on iOS ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c4db3cbf-deca-47a3-9e86-dac9272a96f9 [logs.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27048590/logs.txt) [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
